title: International transfer & multi-currency — compare received amounts
intro: Specialist tools are common companions to a Dutch IBAN — compare calculators on official sites for your actual corridors.

items.reason: Multi-currency transfers — compare fees and received amount for your corridor on Wise’s official calculator.
App-based FX and sends — read plan limits and weekend pricing before large transfers.
